# 京东主题 `jd`

品牌红，来自京东标志色。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #E1251B;
    --primary-dark:  #AA0E0A;
    --primary-light: #F05048;
    --primary-pale:  #FFF1F0;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(225, 37, 27, 0.12);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #6A0000 0%, #AA0E0A 35%, #E1251B 65%, #F84848 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #6A0000 0%, #AA0E0A 50%, #E1251B 100%);
    --red:           #E1251B;
    --green:         #16A34A;
    --orange:        #EA580C;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6A0000 0%, #AA0E0A 50%, #E1251B 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #6A0000 0%, #AA0E0A 35%, #E1251B 65%, #F84848 100%) !important; }
```
